## HistoryQueries.maxItemsToRender property

Maximum number of history queries to show. It should be a lower number than the [HistoryQueriesConfig.maxItemsToStore](./x-components.historyqueriesconfig.maxitemstostore.md)<!-- -->. If it is not provided, it will show all the stored `HistoryQueries`<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected maxItemsToRender?: number;
```
